title: Water-detected NMR reveals novel insights into disease-associated RNA condensates
author: Schmoll, Johannes
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This zip folder contains all the NMR data and matlab codes used for processing for the manuscript 'Water-detected NMR allows dynamic observations of repeat-expansion RNA condensates'.
steps_raw: This zip folder contains all the NMR data and matlab codes used for processing for the manuscript 'Water-detected NMR allows dynamic observations of repeat-expansion RNA condensates'.
